resolution: Comprehensive unit tests already implemented - covers ingestion pipeline, error handling, concurrency control, and rollback mechanisms
title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
description: The new ingestion logic lacks unit tests, which are essential for ensuring correctness and preventing regressions.

root_cause_potential: Missing unit test coverage for new ingestion functionality
Risk of introducing bugs without detection
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Write unit tests covering various scenarios for the ingestion command

immediate_fixes.action: Create comprehensive unit tests for ingestion logic
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure correctness and prevent future regressions
Monitor and maintain adequate test coverage

immediate_fixes.action: Add tests for edge cases and error conditions
immediate_fixes.rationale: Verify robust error handling and boundary conditions

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Risk of undetected bugs in production
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Reduced confidence in code quality
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be resolved to maintain code quality standards
